meanings.definition: be the physical support of; carry the weight of
examples: The beam holds up the roof
He supported me with one hand while I balanced on the beam

meanings.definition: hold up something as an example; hold up one's achievements for admiration
cause to be slowed down or delayed
examples: Traffic was delayed by the bad weather
she delayed the work that she didn't want to perform

meanings.definition: rob at gunpoint or by means of some other threat
continue to live through hardship or adversity
examples: We went without water and food for 3 days
These superstitions survive in the backwaters of America
The race car driver lived through several very serious accidents
how long can a person last without food and water?
The new material withstands even the greatest wear and tear

meanings.definition: resist or withstand wear, criticism, etc.
